description: Compromised API gateway initiates lateral call to web-prod-01 using stolen session token.
web-prod-01 deploys unauthorized workload to svc-cluster-7 using overprivileged k8s service account.
Container assumes svc_account_7 IAM identity via OIDC token exchange with elevated scope.
svc_account_7 executes 47,000 SELECT queries against customer_pii.users table. 1GB data staged.
Session token scope violation — VendorX API gateway token authenticates against prod-db-01.
Normal application connectivity between app-prod-02 and compute cluster.
db_reader role used via svc_account_7 for elevated READ access across customer tables.
Normal API gateway routing to application layer.
PayStream API routing — elevated volume but no confirmed breach.
Payment proxy → database read queries. Normal operational traffic.
